ddls:
CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country or territory */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country or territory */,
  "territory" TEXT /* Indicator if it is a territory or a country */,
  "iso_code" TEXT /* ISO code of the country or territory */,
  "capital_city" TEXT /* Capital city of the country or territory */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the country or territory */,
  "area_km2" INTEGER /* Area of the country or territory in square kilometers */,
  "official_language" TEXT /* Official language of the country or territory */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "currencies" (
  "currency_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each currency */,
  "currency_name" TEXT /* Name of the currency */,
  "currency_code" TEXT /* ISO code of the currency */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country or territory using the currency */,
  "symbol" TEXT /* Symbol of the currency */,
  "subunit" TEXT /* Subunit of the currency */,
  "subunit_to_unit" INTEGER /* Number of subunits per unit */,
  "inflation_rate" REAL /* Inflation rate of the currency */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("currency_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_currencies_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "exchange_rates" (
  "rate_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each exchange rate entry */,
  "currency_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the currency */,
  "units_per_gbp" REAL /* Number of units of the currency per 1 British Pound Sterling (GBP) */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the exchange rate validity */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the exchange rate validity */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the exchange rate was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the exchange rate was last updated */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the exchange rate data */,
  "source_url" TEXT /* URL to the source of the exchange rate data */,
  "confidence_level" TEXT /* Confidence level of the exchange rate data */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or context for the exchange rate */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rate_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_exchange_rates_currency_id FOREIGN KEY ("currency_id") REFERENCES currencies ("currency_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., financial analyst, trader, admin) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "date_joined" TEXT /* Date when the user joined */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login date of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role FOREIGN KEY ("role") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role and its permissions */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "currency_id" INTEGER /* ID of the currency being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download, trade) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent of the user's device */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_currency_id FOREIGN KEY ("currency_id") REFERENCES currencies ("currency_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who set the alert */,
  "currency_id" INTEGER /* ID of the currency being monitored */,
  "threshold" REAL /* Threshold value for triggering the alert */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert (e.g., percentage change, absolute change) */,
  "alert_date" TEXT /* Date when the alert was triggered */,
  "alert_status" TEXT /* Status of the alert (e.g., active, resolved) */,
  "alert_message" TEXT /* Message for the alert */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* Type of notification (e.g., email, SMS) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_currency_id FOREIGN KEY ("currency_id") REFERENCES currencies ("currency_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of the report (e.g., trend analysis, anomaly detection) */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was generated */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the report file */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the report file in MB */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the report (e.g., draft, published, archived) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_logs" (
  "audit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user performing the action */,
  "action_type" TEXT /* Type of action (e.g., create, update, delete) */,
  "action_date" TEXT /* Date when the action was performed */,
  "action_description" TEXT /* Description of the action taken */,
  "module" TEXT /* Module where the action was performed */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("audit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role */,
  "action_type" TEXT /* Type of action (e.g., create, read, update, delete) */,
  "resource" TEXT /* Resource on which the action is performed (e.g., currencies, exchange_rates) */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Access level (e.g., full, read-only, none) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the permission was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the permission was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permissions_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_alerts" (
  "user_alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user alert */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who set the alert */,
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* ID of the alert */,
  "currency_id" INTEGER /* ID of the currency being monitored */,
  "alert_status" TEXT /* Status of the alert (e.g., active, resolved) */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* Type of notification (e.g., email, SMS) */,
  "last_triggered" TEXT /* Last time the alert was triggered */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_alerts_alert_id FOREIGN KEY ("alert_id") REFERENCES alerts ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_alerts_currency_id FOREIGN KEY ("currency_id") REFERENCES currencies ("currency_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_alerts_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
